projects.title: Bus Reservation & Booking System
projects.description: Designed an interactive UI for booking and managing bus seats with real-time scheduling. Integrated REST APIs for booking validation and seat management, providing a seamless user experience.

projects.title: Social Media Post Scheduler
projects.description: Developed a chatbot-like interface to create and schedule posts across multiple platforms including Instagram, Facebook, and LinkedIn. Implemented CRUD features with an integrated date/time picker for automated posting.

projects.title: Secure File Upload & Processing System
projects.description: Built a secure file handling system using AWS services within the AWS Academy sandbox. Automated file event processing using S3 triggers and Lambda functions for real-time logging and monitoring.

projects.title: Cloud-Native Ticketing System
projects.description: Scalable event ticketing platform leveraging AWS Fargate and Docker containers. Implemented high-availability architecture with RDS and ElastiCache for lightning-fast performance.

projects.title: AI Image Generator
projects.description: Creative tool using OpenAI's DALL-E API to generate unique artwork from text prompts. Features a community gallery, user authentication, and high-resolution image downloads.

projects.title: Portfolio Website v1
projects.description: A clean, responsive portfolio showcasing initial work. Built with modern web standards, featuring sections for projects, skills, and a functional contact form.

experience.title: Summer Training in DSA + C++
experience.description: Completed intensive training in Data Structures and Algorithms using C++. Focused on problem-solving techniques, algorithm optimization, and competitive programming concepts.

education.degree: Bachelor of Technology - Computer Science & Engineering
education.description: Pursuing B.Tech in Computer Science & Engineering with focus on Cloud Computing, Full-Stack Development, and Software Engineering.
Completed higher secondary education with excellent academic performance.

achievements.title: GFG's 160 Days of Code Challenge
achievements.description: Successfully completed GeeksforGeeks' 160 Days of Code Challenge, demonstrating consistent problem-solving skills and dedication to continuous learning.

achievements.title: Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI) Multicloud Architect Professional
